member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.BaseWindow
member.summary: Base class for creating ImGui windows in Stride.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.HierarchyView
member.summary: A window that shows the hierarchy of scenes and entities in the current scene.

member.name: F:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.HierarchyView._recursingThrough
member.summary: Based on hashcodes, it doesn't have to be exact, we just don't want to keep references from being collected

member.summary: Gets a pointer to the Texture and adds it to the if it was not previously added.

member.summary: Attempts to convert a pointer to a texture if its in the

member.summary: Clears the dictionaries that contain the mappings between textures and their reference ids:

member.summary: Adds a texture to the ImGui element with the Texture width and height

member.summary: Adds a texture to the ImGui element with a custom width and height

member.summary: Adds a texture to the ImGui element button with the Texture width and height

member.summary: Adds a texture to the ImGui element button with a custom width and height

member.summary: Inspector window for debugging and modifying object properties.

member.summary: Array of all possible values

member.summary: A UI handler function to draw and modify values

member.name: F:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.Inspector.ValueDrawingHandlers
member.summary: Add your drawing functions to explicitly override drawing for objects of the given type

member.summary: Any live inspectors

member.summary: Opened sub object of the inspected object in the tree view

member.summary: Show specialized interface to handle IEnumerable types

member.name: F:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.Inspector.TypeAsStatic
member.summary: For of type , return the content of 'static type.*' instead of 'typeof(type).*'

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.Inspector.MemberFilter
member.summary: Members shown within the interface

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.Inspector.Target
member.summary: The object to inspect

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.Inspector.TypeCache.GetAllMembers(System.Type)
member.summary: Reflection doesn't provide private inherited fields for some reason, this resolves that issue

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.LightweightTimer
member.summary: Represents a lightweight timer for measuring elapsed time with minimal overhead.
member.remarks: This struct provides methods to start, restart, and retrieve elapsed time. It is designed for scenarios where performance is critical, such as in tight loops or high-frequency operations. Use to create and start a new timer, to reset and start the timer, and to retrieve the elapsed time since the timer was started.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.LightweightTimer.InitTime
member.summary: Gets the initial timestamp when the timer was started.

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.LightweightTimer.Elapsed
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time since the timer was started.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.LightweightTimer.Start
member.summary: Starts or restarts the timer by recording the current timestamp.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.LightweightTimer.Restart
member.summary: Use this function and its return value when inside a loop instead of as it guarantees that no time will be discarded

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.LightweightTimer.StartNew
member.summary: Creates and starts a new instance of the class.
member.returns: A instance that has been started and is ready to measure elapsed time.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor
member.summary: Performance monitor window for Stride Engine

member.summary: Circumvent dictionary access access but only works for

member.name: F:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor._threadStaticMonitor
member.summary: Owner of

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.Sample(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Place within a using statement to monitor the code within it. Creates a string each call which will produces unneeded garbage, see for alloc less version.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.Sample(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Place within a using statement to monitor the code within it

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.Guaranteed``2(System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{``0,``1},``0)
member.summary: Guarantees that this key exist and returns at least a default new() value

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.PerfSampler
member.summary: Put this within a using statement to log performance of the code within it. Creates a new for the attached once and have been called. The duration sent to the will be the one between those calls.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.PerfSampler.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of it to log it to the PerfMonitor

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.GraphPoint
member.summary: This struct's operation expects it to only contain instance fields of type.

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.SampleInstance
member.summary: Object containing a sample's data

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.SampleInstance.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.TimeSpan,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Object containing a sample's data

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.TemporaryStrideSample
member.summary: Object to hold Stride's profiler samples until they are marked as done

member.name: T:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.ThreadSampleCollection
member.summary: A collection of for a specific thread, samples are aggregated and once called, will be pushed to .

member.name: F:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.ThreadSampleCollection.Depth
member.summary: Current depth (sample within sample) of this thread, should be incremented when starting and decremented when ending a sample by the .

member.name: P:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.ThreadSampleCollection.Displayed
member.summary: Display-ready samples: samples that have ended before the end of the frame.

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.ThreadSampleCollection.SetReady
member.summary: We received all of the data for this frame, set it has ready

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.ThreadSampleCollection.Add(Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.SampleInstance)
member.summary: The given sample has finished and is ready to be displayed

member.name: M:Stride.CommunityToolkit.ImGui.PerfMonitor.ThreadSampleCollection.ClearBuffered
member.summary: Clear any samples buffered

member.summary: Utility class to provide documentation for various types where available with the assembly

member.summary: Returns false if the documentation file wasn't found

member.summary: Returns false if the documentation file wasn't found
